---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Syllabus Sync
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature would solve. What is frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Be as specific as possible.

## User Stories

- **As a** [student/admin/contributor], **I want to** [action], **so that** [benefit].

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is the proposed solution preferable?

## Acceptance Criteria

Define what "done" looks like:

- [ ] User can ...
- [ ] Feature works on desktop and mobile
- [ ] Covered by unit tests

## Additional Context

Any mockups, links to similar features in other applications, or technical notes that would help with implementation.
